revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Ebumi Shrine]][[ja:江文神社]] {{Expand Japanese|江文神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ebumi Shrine | native_name = 江文神社 | image = Ebumi Shrine.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ebumi Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.113561|135.813451}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Ukanomitama|qid=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama|de|Ukanomitama|en|Ukanomitama|eo|Ukanomitama|fr|Uka-no-Mitama|ja|ウカノミタマ|mni|ꯎꯀꯅꯣꯃꯤꯇꯃ|ru|Ука-но митама|simple|Ukanomitama|sv|Ukanomitama|th|อูกาโนมิตามะ|zh|宇迦之御魂神|qid=Q3080728|1=Ukanomitama}} }} {{nihongo|'''Ebumi Shrine'''|江文神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Kanpei-sha|lt=Kanpei-sha|simple|Kanpei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province|ja|山城国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11467693|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province}} ** Series ordinal: 43 ** P155: {{ill|Q135038780|ltq=Q135038780|qid=Q135038780|1=Suhano Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q276779|ltq=Q276779|qid=Q276779|1=Kifune Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Sakyō-ku, Kyoto|lt=Sakyō-ku|ar|ساكيو-كو|ca|Sakyō|ceb|Sakyō-ku|de|Sakyō-ku (Kyōto)|devoyage|Kyōto/Sakyō-ku|en|Sakyō-ku, Kyoto|fa|ساکیو، کیوتو|fi|Sakyō-ku|fr|Sakyō-ku|id|Sakyō-ku, Kyōto|it|Sakyo-ku|ja|左京区|ko|사쿄구|my|ဆခယောရပ်ကွက်၊ ကျိုတို|nl|Sakyo-ku|ru|Сакё|tr|Sakyō|uk|Район Сакьо|zh_yue|左京區|zh|左京區|qid=Q1321832|1=Sakyō-ku, Kyoto}} * {{ill|Q749276|ltq=Q749276|qid=Q749276|1=Yamashiro Province}} * {{ill|Otagi district|lt=Otagi district|ja|愛宕郡|zh|愛宕郡|qid=Q10981345|1=Otagi district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.113561|135.813451}} == image (P18) == * Ebumi Shrine.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Ukanomitama|qid=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama|de|Ukanomitama|en|Ukanomitama|eo|Ukanomitama|fr|Uka-no-Mitama|ja|ウカノミタマ|mni|ꯎꯀꯅꯣꯃꯤꯇꯃ|ru|Ука-но митама|simple|Ukanomitama|sv|Ukanomitama|th|อูกาโนมิตามะ|zh|宇迦之御魂神|qid=Q3080728|1=Ukanomitama}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 180612 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917284|ltq=Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == architectural style (P149) == * {{ill|Q210684|ltq=Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * えぶみじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 3130005001507 == Commons category (P373) == * Ebumi Shrine == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Itatano Shrine|lt=Itatano Shrine|qid=Q135038781|1=Itatano Shrine}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '京都府京都市左京区大原野村町643', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Ebumi Shrine}} [[JA:江文神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11551131}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Ebumi Shrine |Image = [[File:Ebumi Shrine.jpg|Ebumi Shrine|270px]]
Worship hall |Location = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|qid=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kyoto City|Q34600|qid=Q34600|1=Kyoto}}{{ill|lt=Sakyo Ward|Q1321832|qid=Q1321832|1=Sakyō-ku, Kyoto}} Ōharanomura-chō 643 |Coordinates = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|6|47.6|N|135|48|48.5|E|region:JP-26_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity = {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama-no-Kami|1=Ukanomitama}} |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} candidate shrine / {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former village shrine|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}} |Founded = Unknown |Main hall = {{ill|lt=Nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}}{{ill|lt=Hiwadabuki|Q90373477|qid=Q90373477|1=cypress bark roof}} |Alternative names = Ebumi-dera, Bishamondō Ebumi-dera |Pilgrimage designation = |Annual festival = May 5 |Rituals = Hassaku Festival ({{ill|lt=September 1|Q2859|qid=Q2859|1=September 1}}) |Map = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Ebumi Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Ebumi Shrine''' (えぶみじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Ōharanomura-chō, Sakyo Ward, {{ill|lt=Kyoto City|Q34600|qid=Q34600|1=Kyoto}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|qid=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. An annual grand festival is held every year on {{ill|lt=May 5|Q2550|qid=Q2550|1=May 5}}. The shrine stands beside the mountain pass road leading from {{ill|lt=Ōhara (Kyoto City)|Q3594017|qid=Q3594017|lt=Ōhara|1=Ōhara}} to Shizuhara via {{ill|lt=Ebumi Pass|Q11551130|qid=Q11551130|1=Ebumi Pass}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|qid=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama|Q3080728|qid=Q3080728|qid=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama-no-Kami|1=Ukanomitama}} === History === The date of foundation is unknown. One theory identifies it with “{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Itada Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}” of {{ill|lt=Atago District|Q10981345|qid=Q10981345|1=Otagi district}}, {{ill|lt=Yamashiro Province|Q749276|qid=Q749276|1=Yamashiro Province}}, listed in the '{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}', making it a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}{{ill|lt=candidate shrine|Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}‘{{ill|lt=Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824|qid=Q11588824|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō Studies}}’., but this view is generally rejectedThe prevailing theory assigns it to “Itada Shrine,” a subsidiary shrine within the grounds of {{ill|lt=Sūdō Shrine|Q11477104|qid=Q11477104|1=Sudō Shrine}} in Kamitakano, Sakyo Ward.. According to shrine tradition, it was first established as the {{ill|lt=guardian deity|Q97479976|qid=Q97479976|1=Chinjugami}} of {{ill|lt=Sanzen-in|Q1072538|qid=Q1072538|1=Sanzen-in}}, or alternatively was enshrined through the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=kanjō|1=UNKNOWN}} of {{ill|lt=Ennin|Q732282|qid=Q732282|1=Ennin}} (Jikaku Daishi), the {{ill|lt=chief abbot|Q11486140|qid=Q11486140|1=Zasu}} of {{ill|lt=Enryaku-ji|Q917195|qid=Q917195|1=Enryaku-ji}}, and thus had close ties to {{ill|lt=Sannō Shintō|Q4407806|qid=Q4407806|1=Sannō Ichijitsu Shintō}}. Another account holds that the deities once worshiped on the summit of {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mount Ebumi|1=UNKNOWN}} (now {{ill|lt=Mount Konpira (Kyoto Prefecture)|UNKNOWN|lt=Mount Konpira}}) were transferred to a newly built shrine building at the mountain’s foot. The shrine prospered during the medieval period, but is said to have declined due to the impact of {{ill|lt=Oda Nobunaga|Q171411|qid=Q171411|1=Oda Nobunaga}}’s {{ill|lt=Burning of Mount Hiei (1571)|Q10748887|qid=Q10748887|lt=campaign against Mount Hiei|1=Siege of Mount Hiei}}. It is the {{ill|lt=ujigami|Q767655|qid=Q767655|1=Ujigami}} (tutelary shrine) of the eight towns of {{ill|lt=Ōhara (Kyoto City)|Q3594017|qid=Q3594017|lt=Ōhara|1=Ōhara}}. Originally, it was a {{ill|lt=syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism|Q2279088|qid=Q2279088|1=Shinbutsu-shūgō}} {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=jingū-ji|1=UNKNOWN}} known as '''Bishamondō Ebumi-dera'''. === Subsidiary shrines === * Shina-tsuhiko Shrine ({{ill|lt=Shinatsuhiko|Q1073925|qid=Q1073925|lt=Shinatsuhiko-no-Mikoto|1=Shinatsuhiko}} / Hattori deity) * Kagutsuchi Shrine ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kagutsuchi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} / {{ill|lt=Iidō Shrine|Q11666695|qid=Q11666695|lt=Mount Iidō deity|1=Iimichi Shrine}} / {{ill|lt=Hachiman Shrine|Q11390939|qid=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}}) * Mansan Shrine ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Atago deity|1=UNKNOWN}} / {{ill|lt=Goryō belief|Q3273210|qid=Q3273210|lt=goryō spirits|1=Goryō}} / {{ill|lt=Kashima Shrine|Q706499|qid=Q706499|lt=Kashima deity|1=Kashima Jingū}}) * Tenmangū Shrine ({{ill|lt=Tenmangū|Q798838|qid=Q798838|1=Tenmangū}} / {{ill|lt=Inari deity|Q719665|qid=Q719665|1=Inari Ōkami}}) * (Located outside the precincts, in Ōhara Ōnagase-chō) Umenomiya Shrine === Access === * From the Nomura Wakare {{ill|lt=bus stop|Q953806|qid=Q953806|lt=bus stop|1=Bus stop}} on {{ill|lt=Kyoto Bus|Q11374813|qid=Q11374813|1=Kyoto Bus}}, walk 500 m west. * The Kyoto Bus “Ebumi Shrine-mae” bus stop is served by the {{ill|lt=Kyoto Bus Takano Depot#Ōhara–Kurama Line|Q11374815|qid=Q11374815|lt=No. 55 route|1=No. 55 route}} with three round trips per day, as well as the No. 95 route, which runs only once on {{ill|lt=Vernal Equinox Day|Q1049141|qid=Q1049141|1=Vernal Equinox Day}}. Because service is limited, visitors using public transportation should also consider the access method above. === Notes === {{reflist}} === References === * “Kyoto–Yamashiro Temple and Shrine Encyclopedia,” {{ill|lt=Heibonsha|Q11482108|qid=Q11482108|1=Heibonsha}}, 1997 * “Report on the Investigation of Shikinaisha,” Vol. 1, Kyoto and Kinai 1, {{ill|lt=Kōgakkan University|UNKNOWN|lt=Kōgakkan University Press}}, 1979 === Related items === * {{ill|lt=Ōhara Zakone|Q11433198|qid=Q11433198|1=Ōhara Zakone}} * {{ill|lt=Thirty Guardian Deities|Q11354495|qid=Q11354495|1=Thirty Guardian Deities}} {{Shinto sidebar}} {{shinto-stub}} {{Buddhism-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=Kyoto Prefecture}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ebumi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ebumi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Sannō Ichijitsu Shintō]] [[Category:Shinbutsu bunri]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Sakyo-ku, Kyoto]] [[Category:Ohara (Kyoto)]] [[Category:History of Sakyo-ku, Kyoto]]
